summary: Tail-recursive prefix-max scan over an i64 slice (rolling_max_at) building a Vec output via extend_from_slice with a typed [i64;1] chunk; strong induction on size − i.toNat with an elementwise output invariant `acc.val[j].toInt = prefix_max_int numbers (j+1)` — the step lemma discharges unsize / Impl_2.extend_from_slice / a custom push_one helper, Array.getElem_append_left/right closes the per-index property at the newly appended slot, a usize_beq_zero_eq lemma bridges the BEq `(i == 0)` short-circuit to `decide (i.toNat = 0)` to avoid an i64::MIN sentinel, and a recursive Nat→Int oracle (prefix_max_int) with an explicit k=0 arm encodes the first-iteration special case.
